name: Erich Hartmann
longDesc: Erich Hartmann est un général aérienne de qualité or — Allemagne. Données extraites du jeu — descriptions et conseils tactiques à confirmer.

skills.name: Eagle Fly
skills.desc: Boosts 40% dodge rate and 4 mobility when commanding an air hover unit, and decreases 30% taken damage from air forces. Boost critical strike damage 1% based on 1% dodge rate when air hovering units attack.

skills.name: Airforce Leader
skills.desc: 40% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding air units

skills.name: Carpet Bombing
skills.desc: Damage +32% to the defending forces in the city when air-raiding

skills.name: Fluke
skills.desc: When commanded troop activates dodge, restore 15% based on self's maximum HP (up to 1 time per turn)

skills.name: Inferior Victory
skills.desc: Damage is increased by 16% when the number of troop formations under command is 1.

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Erich Hartmann is a gold-quality air force general — Germany. Data extracted from the game — descriptions and tactical notes to be confirmed.
longDescDe: Erich Hartmann ist ein Gold-Luftwaffen-General — Deutschland. Daten aus dem Spiel extrahiert — Beschreibungen und taktische Hinweise noch zu bestätigen.
